inputs.label: First Operand (Decimal)
inputs.businessContext: Enter the first decimal number for the arithmetic operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the first decimal number for the arithmetic operation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aritmetik işlem için ilk ondalık sayıyı girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie die erste Dezimalzahl für die arithmetische Operation ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le premier nombre décimal pour l'opération arithmétique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese el primer número decimal para la operación aritmética.

inputs.label: Second Operand (Decimal)
inputs.businessContext: Enter the second decimal number for the arithmetic operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the second decimal number for the arithmetic operation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aritmetik işlem için ikinci ondalık sayıyı girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie die zweite Dezimalzahl für die arithmetische Operation ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le second nombre décimal pour l'opération arithmétique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese el segundo número decimal para la operación aritmética.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the result (applies to division). 0 for integer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the result (applies to division). 0 for integer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonuç için ondalık basamak sayısı (bölme için geçerlidir). Tamsayı için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für das Ergebnis (gilt für Division). 0 für ganze Zahl.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat (s'applique à la division). 0 pour entier.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el resultado (aplica a división). 0 para entero.

formulas.decimalResult: operation === 1 ? operandA + operandB : operation === 2 ? operandA - operandB : operation === 3 ? operandA * operandB : operation === 4 ? (operandB !== 0 ? operandA / operandB : 'Error: Division by zero') : 'Error: Invalid operation'
formulas.decimalResult_aux: operation === 1 ? operandA + operandB : operation === 2 ? operandA - operandB : operation === 3 ? operandA * operandB : operation === 4 ? (operandB !== 0 ? operandA / operandB : 'Error: Division by zero') : 'Error: Invalid operation'

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
